item.title: Resume First Impressions Matter 🌟 • Start with a strong headline—your job title or expertise. • Include a concise summary—2-3 sentences max. • Highlight key skills relevant to the job. • Showcase top achievements in bullet points. What changes can you make to your resume's opening section today? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Resume First Impressions Matter 🌟 • Start with a strong headline—your job title or expertise. • Include a concise summary—2-3 sentences max. • Highlight key skills relevant to the job. • Showcase top achievements in bullet points. What changes can you make to your resume's opening section today? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
